cards.item: アイデア; アイディア
cards.reading: アイデア; アイディア
readings: アイデア; アイディア

meanings: presence of absence consent or refusal
to chase or run after someone
part of word written in kana
to hold steady to cover (esp. a part of one's body with one's hand)
to clutch (a body part in pain)
to press (a body part) to get a hold of
Sorry to have kept you waiting
Sorry to have kept you waiting
to the best of one's ability
to put on top of another to repeat many times over
to simultaneously serve two or more functions
to cut down little by little
Thank you for your hard work
it is I who should say so
not writing or contacting for a while
one's own home (same as 自分の家 (じぶんのいえ))

by all means (with sense of not taking 'no' for an answer)

Mister (mostly in addressing someone on an envelope)
bowl of rice with food on top
I am glad to meet you
way of thinking (same as 考え方 (かんがえかた))
etc.) to be hot and humid
to meet at a prearranged place and time
to let someone approach to bring near
to donate to let someone drop by
